General.Name: Spartoo SAS
General.Description: SPARTOO SAS operates as an online retailer for fashion items in Europe. It offers shoes, clothing, underwear, beauty products, sports products, luxury, bags, and jewelries for women, men, and children. The company also provides fashion sneakers, ankle boots, maccasins and boat shoes, slippers, mules/clogs, sandals and barefoot shoes, pumps, ballerinas/babies, sports shoes, slip-ons, flip-flops, and skateboarding shoes; and coats, jeans, jackets, sweaters and cardigans, t-shirts and polos, sweatshirts and fleeces, dresses, pants, jogging and tracksuits, tops/blouses, skirts, shirts, pajamas, shorts and Bermudas, and swimsuits and swim shorts. In addition, it offers panties and other stockings, bras and brassies, other type of lingeries, boxers, underpants, and briefs; backpacks, pouches/bags, messenger and shoulder bags, wallets/purses, suitcases, travel bags, and sports bags, handbags, and tote/shopping bags; perfumes, hair care, anils, complexion makeup, beauty accessories, and body and bath care; sunglasses and watches; and BMX/skateboard, indoor sport, hiking, and soccer equipment. Further, the company provides schoolbags, kits, and body suits for children. SPARTOO SAS was founded in 2006 and is based in Grenoble, France.

1.Name: Mr. Paul  Lorne
1.Title: Co-Founder, Head of Supply Chain & Deputy CEO
